projects.name: Indoor Insects
projects.blurb: Insects, arachnids, and small invertebrates that turn up indoors. Identification, habitat, and management for the species most often submitted to extension offices.

projects.name: Lawn & Garden Insects
projects.sciName: Pests and beneficials of turf and ornamentals
projects.blurb: Beetles, caterpillars, true bugs, and pollinators across residential lawns, vegetable plots, and ornamental beds.

projects.name: Beetles of Indiana
projects.blurb: Field reference to the beetle families and conspicuous species recorded across Indiana, with emphasis on diagnostic external characters.
